title: Emmisive Textures | Legendary Monuments
description: Glowing textures for Legendary Monuments ores when using shaders
body:
Adds dynamic textures for the Cobblemon: Legendary Monument's ores. It works with Iris, Sodium, and Optifine, letting you mine for ease or just makes you caves look more appealing.

To use it, simply put it in your resource packs folder along with running your favorite shader pack to make the ores light up the dark caves.
